rules.name: Missing Reentrancy Pragma
rules.description: File-level reentrancy protection missing on state-mutating contracts.
rules.remediation: Use nonreentrancy protections or documented safe callback design.

rules.name: Unguarded State-Mutating External Function
rules.description: Sensitive external function may be permissionless.
rules.remediation: Add explicit access control or document permissionless intent.

rules.name: raw_call Without Failure Handling
rules.description: raw_call may silently fail if return handling is missing.
rules.remediation: Use revert_on_failure=True or assert success return.

rules.name: Delegatecall to Unvalidated Target
rules.description: Delegatecall target may be mutable or untrusted.
rules.remediation: Pin immutable validated targets and constrain upgrade paths.

rules.name: Missing default_return_value on ERC20 Calls
rules.description: Non-standard ERC20 return behavior may break call flow.
rules.remediation: Use default_return_value for supported non-compliant tokens.

rules.name: Unlimited Token Approvals
rules.description: Long-lived unlimited approvals increase blast radius.
rules.remediation: Use bounded approvals or immediate revoke patterns.

rules.name: Unchecked int256 to uint256 Conversion
rules.description: Negative values can revert and create DoS paths.
rules.remediation: Validate positivity before conversion.

rules.name: Unvalidated Immutable at Construction
rules.description: Immutable initialization may lack deployment-time validation.
rules.remediation: Validate constructor/deploy arguments and bounds.

rules.name: DynArray Capacity Panic DoS
rules.description: Capacity exhaustion can permanently block appends.
rules.remediation: Enforce bounded growth and exhaustion-safe handling.

rules.name: Missing Initialization Guard
rules.description: Initialization logic may permit re-initialization.
rules.remediation: Add one-time initialization guards.

rules.name: tx.origin for Authentication
rules.description: Authentication based on tx.origin is phishing-prone.
rules.remediation: Use msg.sender for authorization.

rules.name: CEI Violation
rules.description: State updates after external interactions may be unsafe.
rules.remediation: Apply checks-effects-interactions ordering.

rules.name: Unchecked raw_call Return Value
rules.description: raw_call result may be ignored.
rules.remediation: Check return or enforce revert_on_failure.

rules.name: First-Depositor Share Inflation
rules.description: Initial share math may enable donation/inflation attack.
rules.remediation: Use virtual offsets or minimum initial liquidity controls.

rules.name: Oracle Staleness or Negative Price Handling
rules.description: Oracle validation may omit freshness/positivity checks.
rules.remediation: Validate updatedAt, positivity, and round integrity.

rules.name: Fee Accrual Ordering
rules.description: Fee accrual may run in unsafe order relative to state updates.
rules.remediation: Accrue fees before dependent state changes.

rules.name: Accounting Drift
rules.description: Asset valuation basis drift can misprice shares or solvency.
rules.remediation: Use robust valuation model and reconciliation checks.

rules.name: Arithmetic Underflow DoS
rules.description: Underflow-induced revert can block critical paths.
rules.remediation: Add bounds checks before subtraction.

rules.name: Callback Trust Boundary
rules.description: Callback caller validation may be missing.
rules.remediation: Validate caller identity at callback entry.

rules.name: ecrecover Signature Malleability
rules.description: Missing signature canonicalization checks.
rules.remediation: Enforce low-s checks and replay protection.

rules.name: send() Reentrancy under EIP-1153
rules.description: send usage may interact unsafely with modern reentrancy mechanics.
rules.remediation: Prefer pull patterns or safer call constructions.

rules.name: Transient Storage Not Cleared
rules.description: Transient state may leak across transaction-local contexts.
rules.remediation: Clear transient state on all exits.

rules.name: Transient State Persists Across Reverts
rules.description: Transient state may remain inconsistent after subcall failures.
rules.remediation: Reinitialize transient state around subcall boundaries.

rules.name: Minimal Proxy to Unvalidated Target
rules.description: Proxy target may be mutable/untrusted.
rules.remediation: Use immutable validated implementation target.

rules.name: Blueprint Without ERC-5202 Validation
rules.description: Blueprint deployment assumptions may be unvalidated.
rules.remediation: Validate blueprint preamble and code offset assumptions.

rules.name: Payable Default with State Modification
rules.description: Default payable entrypoint may be insufficiently guarded.
rules.remediation: Constrain default path and add explicit checks.

rules.name: Module Initialization Order Dependency
rules.description: Module initialization ordering may violate dependencies.
rules.remediation: Enforce dependency-safe initialization order.

rules.name: uses Without initializes
rules.description: Module declared but potentially uninitialized.
rules.remediation: Ensure module initialization is explicit and validated.

rules.name: Missing exports for Module External Functions
rules.description: Expected module externals may be absent from interface export.
rules.remediation: Keep exports aligned with intended external API.

rules.name: Flag Conversion Out-of-Range
rules.description: Flag conversions may accept invalid bit patterns.
rules.remediation: Validate allowable flag values before conversion.

rules.name: ecrecover or Identity Precompile Success Not Checked
rules.description: Compiler-level CVE affecting precompile success handling.
rules.remediation: Upgrade compiler and add explicit validity assertions.

rules.name: AugAssign on DynArray with RHS Mutation
rules.description: Compiler-level memory safety issue in specific augmented assignment flows.
rules.remediation: Upgrade compiler and rewrite expression forms.

rules.name: sqrt Rounding Error
rules.description: Compiler-level sqrt rounding defect.
rules.remediation: Upgrade compiler and apply defensive correction.

rules.name: For Loop Conditional Iterator Re-evaluation
rules.description: Compiler-level iterator evaluation bug.
rules.remediation: Upgrade compiler and split iterator expressions.

rules.name: slice Side-Effects Elided at Zero Length
rules.description: Compiler-level side-effect elision for zero-length slice.
rules.remediation: Upgrade compiler and isolate side-effecting expressions.

rules.name: concat Side-Effects Elided for Zero-Length Args
rules.description: Compiler-level side-effect elision for zero-length concat arguments.
rules.remediation: Upgrade compiler and pre-evaluate side-effecting inputs.

rules.name: Reversed Side-Effect Evaluation Order
rules.description: Unfixed compiler behavior may reverse expected side-effect order.
rules.remediation: Split expressions into explicit sequential statements.

rules.name: skip_contract_check Misuse
rules.description: Bypassing contract checks on interface binding can trust malformed or unexpected targets.
rules.remediation: Use explicit allowlists and validate return-shape assumptions before trusting responses.

rules.name: Unchecked Contract-Creation Return
rules.description: Creation return values may be trusted without zero-address and code-presence checks.
rules.remediation: Validate non-zero return address and contract code before any trust or registration step.

rules.name: create_copy_of Target Integrity Risk
rules.description: create_copy_of may clone untrusted or mutable code when source provenance is weak.
rules.remediation: Pin source address immutably and verify codehash/provenance before clone operations.

rules.name: @raw_return ABI Boundary Hazard
rules.description: Raw return paths can violate ABI expectations for integrators and downstream interface assumptions.
rules.remediation: Constrain raw return use to documented boundaries and validate integration-level ABI behavior.

rules.name: selfdestruct Semantic Assumption Risk
rules.description: Logic that assumes legacy full-delete selfdestruct behavior can fail under modern EVM semantics.
rules.remediation: Avoid security-critical reliance on selfdestruct side effects; use explicit disable and withdraw flows.

rules.name: Non-standard Token Return Handling
rules.description: Token integration assumes ERC20-compliant bool return values without defensive handling.
rules.remediation: Use balance-delta checks or explicit default return handling for non-standard tokens.

rules.name: Fee-on-Transfer Accounting Drift
rules.description: Accounting credits requested transfer amount instead of actual balance delta.
rules.remediation: Use pre/post balance measurements for all token transfers.

rules.name: Token Blocklist/Pause Assumption
rules.description: Protocol assumes token transfer liveness even when token admin pause/blocklist exists.
rules.remediation: Document and enforce emergency exits under token transfer restrictions.

rules.name: Oracle Staleness and Round Integrity
rules.description: Oracle inputs may be stale or malformed without freshness and round consistency checks.
rules.remediation: Validate staleness window, positivity, and round completeness before use.

rules.name: Randomness Callback Authorization Gap
rules.description: Randomness fulfill callbacks may accept unauthorized callers or duplicate responses.
rules.remediation: Restrict callback caller and enforce one-time fulfillment state transitions.

rules.name: CREATE2/EXTCODESIZE Trust Assumption
rules.description: Runtime assumptions about address determinism or contract detection may be unsafe.
rules.remediation: Avoid EXTCODESIZE-only trust checks and validate deployment invariants explicitly.

rules.name: Cross-Chain Replay Protection Missing
rules.description: Cross-domain message handling may permit replay across chains/domains.
rules.remediation: Bind nonces/messages to domain IDs and enforce one-time consumption.

rules.name: AMM Slippage Bound Missing
rules.description: Swap paths may execute without deterministic slippage protections.
rules.remediation: Require caller-provided min-out and deadline checks.

rules.name: Lending Health Factor Enforcement Gap
rules.description: Borrow/withdraw paths may not enforce post-operation health factor thresholds.
rules.remediation: Recompute and enforce health factor before committing state.

rules.name: NFT Hook Reentrancy Boundary
rules.description: NFT receiver hooks may re-enter protocol flows without guard or sequencing controls.
rules.remediation: Guard hook entrypoints and isolate settlement effects before external callbacks.

rules.name: Reward Index Drift in Staking Logic
rules.description: Reward-per-share index or claim ordering may drift under repeated updates.
rules.remediation: Use monotonic index updates and bounded rounding policy.

rules.name: Integration Control Coverage Gap
rules.description: Integration controls required by SCSVS may be partially covered or undocumented.
rules.remediation: Map integration controls to explicit checks and require evidence in standards summary.
